 968 | |                             processor.extract_plugins(content)
 969 | |
 970 | |                         # Pattern matching
 971 | |                         if error_point == "pattern_matching":
 972 | |                             # Use invalid patterns occasionally
 973 | |                             if operation_id % 5 == 0:

 975 | |                                 processor.find_all_patterns(content, patterns)
 976 | |                             else:
 977 | |                                 patterns = ["FormID", "Plugin"]

 990 | |                         else:
 991 | |                             test_result["system_errors"] += 1
 992 | |
